name: divergeit
description: DivergeIT — legal-practice automation. The Timekeeper plugin for Microsoft 365-native time reconstruction and Clio billing.

plugins.name: timekeeper
plugins.description: Microsoft 365-native legal practice assistant for fiduciary/receivership firms. Adaptively reconstructs billable time for one, several, or all timekeepers; sets exact per-matter rates from an authoritative rate card; drafts court-defensible, present-tense entries; reviews and reconciles billing; and ends with an import-ready Clio CSV plus a direct Clio import hand-off. Also: matters, contacts, calendar, M365 search, and pdf/docx/xlsx/csv parsing + creation. Built by DivergeIT for FedReceiver / Jalmar Properties.
